codeReview.summary: The feature successfully migrates CLI parsing/dispatch to a typed yargs-based intent parser while preserving the required public command/flag contract for version/help/default command/unknown command/missing-name handling and short-vs-long flag parity.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared command catalog includes an integration-real test command that is not actually wired in package scripts.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml defines `test_integration_real: bun run test:integration:real`, but package.json scripts currently include `test:unit` and `test:integration:mock` only (no `test:integration:real`).

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill procedure says tests-first (red) before implementation, but this worker implemented parser/dispatch before adding unit tests; skill guidance may need to explicitly allow interface scaffolding-first for net-new modules.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton shows Create of `cli/src/parser.ts` and rewrite of `cli/src/cli.ts` before creating `cli/tests/unit/parser.test.ts`; handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges also requests this clarification.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, worker skill, and commit 737a042 diff. Implementation aligns with VAL-CORE-001/002/003/003A/004/008/009/012 and preserves required CLI compatibility; review passes with shared-state follow-up notes only.
